title: Easy NBT Editor
description: An easy GUI based NBT Editor for Minecraft client side requiring only creative mode.
body:
## ✨ Features

**Tested on 1.21.4 other versions compatibility unknown use at your own risk.**

Your GUI-based Minecraft NBT Item Editor includes a comprehensive set of editable tags, organized for clarity:
---

### 🔢 Numeric & Text Fields
- `max_stack_size`
- `max_damage`
- `damage`
- `custom_name`
- `item_name`
- `custom_model_data`
- `repair_cost`
- `ominous_bottle_amplifier`
- `item_model`
- `tooltip_style`
- `enchantable`
- `damage_resistant`
- `lock`

---

### ☑️ Toggleable Options (Checkboxes)
- `unbreakable`
- `hide_tooltip`
- `hide_additional_tooltip`
- `creative_slot_lock`
- `enchantment_glint_override`
- `intangible_projectile`
- `repairable`
- `glider`
- `death_protection`

---

### 🔽 Dropdown Fields
- `rarity`
- `equippable`

---

### 🧩 Sub-Editors for Complex Tags
- `enchantments`
- `stored_enchantments`
- `attribute_modifiers`
- `dyed_color`
- `food`
- `potion_contents`
- `use_remainder`
- `trim`
- `consumable`
- `jukebox_playable`
- `tool`
- `suspicious_stew_effects`
- `instrument`
- `note_block_sound`
- `base_color`
- `use_cooldown`
- `lodestone_tracker`
- `pot_decorations`
- `banner_patterns`
- `bees`

---

### 📝 Text Area Fields
- `lore`
- `can_place_on`
- `can_break`

---

This feature set makes the editor extremely powerful, covering everything from basic item properties to advanced NBT structures—all through a clean and intuitive UI.
